title: DeveloperAppKey
description: Consumer key and secret for a developer app.

consumerKey.description: Consumer key (API key) for the developer app.

consumerSecret.description: Consumer secret for the developer app.

apiProducts.description: API products associated with this key.

status.description: Status of the credential (approved or revoked).

expiresAt.description: Time the key expires in milliseconds since epoch. -1 means never.

issuedAt.description: Output only. Time the key was issued in milliseconds since epoch.

scopes.description: OAuth scopes granted to the key.
